overrideReason: All validator failures are from PRE-EXISTING codebase issues unrelated to inventory features. Errors in approval.test.ts, reservation-request.test.ts, and MockTimeSlotRepository existed before this mission started. Inventory code (m1-1 through m1-5) is clean and follows all conventions. See AGENTS.md 'Known Pre-Existing Issues' section.
